creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption:
New York City Highlights of 2025: January 24th, the Hudson River had frozen over(partially) for the first time since 2018 because NYC had record-breaking cold temperatures. 

If you want to visit this exact place, it’s located at the Gansevoort Peninsula Beach along West 14th Street just below Little Island
